content.en:
"Yin and Yang Qishan?"

Ye Tian had never heard of this name, so he asked the machine spirit about the information of Yin Yang Qi Mountain.

Ji Ling introduced: "Yin Yang Qi Mountain is a very special treasure land, only the invincible are allowed to enter, and the supreme cannot enter Yin Yang Qi Mountain. Moreover, if you want to enter Yin-Yang Qi Mountain, you must pass through several entrances of Yin-Yang Qi Mountain, and there is no other way. The entrance to Yin-Yang Qishan is not fixed, and it only exists for a short time before disappearing, and then it will appear in another place. Because of this, even if many invincible people want to enter Yin-Yang Qi Mountain, they can't enter it at all, which also leads to Yin Yang Qi Mountain being rarely known. "

"Machine Spirit, then how do I enter Yin Yang Qi Mountain?"

Ye Tian asked.

Ji Ling said: "There is a strange tree growing in the Yin Yang Qi Mountain, the strange tree has many cyan leaves, and a golden leaf will be born in the long years, and this golden leaf contains a trace of the power of the Yin Yang Qi Mountain, and the golden leaf can sense the nearest entrance location. And there is a golden leaf in the Void Source Palace, when the master holds the leaf, he can sense the nearest entrance, and let the Void Source Hall move the master to the entrance position, and you can enter the Yin Yang Qi Mountain. "

"Give me the golden leaf!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes, master!"

The machine spirit took out a golden leaf and handed it to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian held the golden leaf and wanted to study it, but he couldn't see through the golden leaf, and only felt that it had a trace of special aura on it.

"There are too many wonderful things in the source sea!"

Ye Tian sighed, but he didn't study this golden leaf too much.

Then, Ye Tian's copy body left the Void Source Hall with this golden leaf, sensing the location of the entrance to Yin Yang Qi Mountain through the golden leaf.

"I sensed it!"

Ye Tian looked into the distance, one of the entrances was there, although it was the closest entrance, it was not close to him.

If you fly there at your own speed, you might be able to disappear the entrance after you fly over.

So, Ye Tian let the Void Source Hall move himself, and instantly crossed the endless and distant Source Sea area, approaching that entrance.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian saw a black whirlpool, and this black whirlpool was the entrance to Yin Yang Qi Mountain.

It exists here, but there is not a single creature around, maybe no invincible has ever discovered this entrance, after all, the source sea is too big, and the range of the invincible in the source sea is too small, a little farther, it will not be able to sense the black vortex entrance here.

Ye Tian put away the golden leaves and flew into the black whirlpool.

......

Yin and Yang Qi Mountain.

It was an incomparably large mountain range, and above the void there were two suns, one golden and one black.

Even the earth is half light and half dark.

Here, there are only two opposing rules.

The rules of yin and yang, the rules of light and the rules of darkness.

Since there are no other rules, this place is strictly an incomplete world, once the invincible enters the invincible, their own rules will conflict with the rules here, so the invincible cannot stay here for a long time, otherwise the body and soul will collapse.

However, the rules of yin and yang are blended together, the rules of light and the rules of darkness are blended together, and even the void and the earth are vaguely blended together, making this place extremely strange and special.

And the invincible comprehends the mysteries here, comprehends the mystery of blending, and even helps the fusion of soul and body to a certain extent.

Therefore, the invincible people who come here to enlighten are basically second-class invincibles, and it is not helpful for other invincibles to come here.

At this time, all the peaks of Yin Yang Qi Mountain have second-class invincible people practicing here, but some second-class invincible people tremble all over, as if they are suffering greatly, and they are obviously about to be unable to support it, which is the backlash and conflict of rules.

Obviously, they have been here for a long time, but they are still unwilling to give up, otherwise they may not have the opportunity to enter Yin Yang Qishan next time.

Ye Tian casually chose a small mountain peak and observed the changes in the rules here.

"There is still a place like this!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

After coming here, he realized the value and usefulness of this place, it was really an incomparably rare treasure for a second-class invincible, and it was too helpful for fusing the body and soul.

Ye Tian also felt the conflict between his own rules and Yin Yang Qishan, but his physical body was very strong, so he could hold on for a long time.

Moreover, he can enter Yin Yang Qi Mountain again and again, unlike other people who have to rely on luck when they enter it once.

So, he wasn't worried at all.

At this time, Ye Tian comprehended the mystery of the fusion of heaven and earth, and tried the fusion of body and soul again and again, and the mysterious combination of heaven and earth, so as to find out the way and path of integration, so as not to be confused.

As time passed, a second-class invincible was forced to leave here, and occasionally second-class invincibles entered here, but it took a long time for some second-class invincibles to enter, and basically they entered a lot as soon as they entered.

In this case, it was obvious that the entrance was discovered, and the other second-class invincibles were notified, so that they entered together in a short time.

In the blink of an eye, three dark calendars passed.

"It's almost the limit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The others didn't hold on as long as he did, and he was able to hold on to three dark hours, which was already a long time.

Through these three dark time meditations, Ye Tian had already figured out how to complete the fusion of the physical tribulation realm and the soul tribulation realm, but this time the comprehension was reduced by two-thirds at most, and he still needed to continue to comprehend.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian left from Yin Yang Qi Mountain, and after returning to the Void Source Palace, he disintegrated this copy body and continued to condense a copy body, allowing this copy body to enter Yin Yang Qi Mountain again.

Entering this time, Ye Tian changed his aura and appearance, coupled with the mask that concealed his identity, he would not be easily recognized by others, otherwise it would be absolutely strange for others to see that he could enter Yin Yang Qi Mountain twice.

He didn't want to cause any trouble, at least not now.

In the following years, Ye Tian entered Yin Yang Qi Mountain again and again, comprehending the mysteries of the blending here.

Gradually, Ye Tian comprehended more and more, and he was already fully sure that he could fuse the Flesh Tribulation Realm and the Soul Tribulation Realm, and it would not be too long for the years.

this day.

After Ye Tian came out of Yin Yang Qi Mountain, he was not ready to enter again, it would not help him much.

He is ready to completely retreat and attack the realm of first-class invincibles.
